# nw_privacy_context_clear_proxies(_:)

**Function**

Clears out any proxies added using [doc://com.apple.network/documentation/Network/nw_privacy_context_add_proxy(_:_:)]

## Declaration

```swift
func nw_privacy_context_clear_proxies(_ privacy_context: nw_privacy_context_t)
```

## Parameters

- **privacy_context**: A privacy context to modify. This can include the default privacy context.

## Configuring Proxies

- **nw_privacy_context_add_proxy(_:_:)**: Applies a proxy configuration to all connections associated with this context.
- **nw_proxy_config_t**: A proxy configuration for Relays, Oblivious HTTP, HTTP CONNECT, or SOCKSv5.
